arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United host Nottingham Forest in a crunch clash for both side’s Champions League ambitions. Eddie Howe’s side suffered a setback last weekend with defeat at Manchester City but remain just three points from the top four. Last weekend’s loss brought an end to a four-game winning run for the Magpies, who have reached the […] The post Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: My Newcastle United transfer was 'done on my side' but didn't happen
arts.sum: Austin ended up moving to Southampton, instead, in 2016, and following spells at West Brom, QPR (again), Brisbane Roar and Swindon Town, the veteran has joined AFC Totton as he balances spending time with his family while also playing the game he loves. Because I played non-league years and years ago, everyone's like, 'How are you going to be?' Going back 15 years, I was getting kicked by these fellas.

arts.ttl: Djed Spence and two former Nottingham Forest players send messages to Brennan Johnson after Tottenham win
Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Nottingham Forest with three huge decisions
arts.sum: Eddie Howe is not a man who likes to make too many changes to his Newcastle United starting XI, but he could send a strong statement to his squad when he names the side to face Nottingham Forest today. But he does have some significant avenues for change, and it would be no surprise to see a different XI against Forest today, starting in goal.

arts.ttl: Merson: Newcastle's looming final big problem for Howe ahead of Forest clash
arts.sum: Paul Merson says Newcastle's looming Carabao Cup final is a big problem for Eddie Howe as he prepares for a "must-win" game against top-four rivals Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest predicted XI vs Newcastle as Nuno starts £3m player and rotates his midfield
Newcastle United vs Forest TV channel, live stream, early kick off time
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest head to St James' Park riding high in the Premier League table, but United have already beaten them twice this season - albeit once on penalties - and know the size of their task today, especially after the bruising 4-0 defeat to Manchester City. It's one of two Premier League games today, with Manchester vs Liverpool at 4.30pm.

arts.ttl: 'Quote me', Newcastle United exit left me heartbroken but ignorant pundits will never get it
arts.sum: As Elliot, who did an amazing job at Gateshead after winning the FA Trophy and leading the Tynesiders to the National League play-off spot, attempts to steer Crawley Town to third flight safety he is digging deep into his experiences at Newcastle. We are trying to play good football with young and inexperienced players a bit like we did at Gateshead .

arts.sum: Two sides looking to get back to winning ways meet at St James’ Park on Sunday, when Newcastle host Nottingham Forest. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our pr...

arts.ttl: Premier League issue Newcastle United VAR statement to clarify big decision with Arsenal example
arts.sum: A statement on their website read: "During Newcastle United's match with Bournemouth in Match Round 22, Sandro Tonali attempted a clearance to save his side from facing a corner, but it was intercepted on the edge of the box by Ryan Christie, and during the same attacking possession phase (APP), Dango Ouattara scored. Dango Ouattara thought he had scored in the second half but replays showed that the ball had actually gone out of play, despite Sandro Tonali's best attempts, before he scored.
